claimText: Tsinghua University urges vigilance toward AI 'hallucinations' and stresses multi-source verification to guard against cognitive complacency from overreliance on AI (prudence and critical thinking principle).
evidenceSnippetOriginal: 「审慎思辨」原则提醒师生警惕人工智能「幻觉」，应通过多源验证防范因过度依赖导致的思维惰化。

citation.citationTitle: 【深改进行时】《清华大学人工智能教育应用指导原则》发布
